title: Crispy Pork Belly Bites
description: A sweet and savory twist on traditional pork belly, perfect for a quick snack or appetizer. Crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, these bites are sure to delight.

ingredients.name: chinese rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: or substitute with apple cider vinegar

instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Cut the pork belly into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes.
In a bowl, mix together soy sauce, five-spice powder, rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat.
Dust the pork cubes with cornstarch.
Fry the pork cubes in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the pork on paper towels.
If desired, brush with honey for a sweet glaze.
